title: Similarities Between 30 and Anima
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Similarities Between 3.0 and Anima             Quote Post by 4thImpact » Sun Nov 18, 2012 2:59 pm Hi all. I've been lurking around Evageeks for years, just never made an account till now. Wanted to join in all the Q excitement and all. But on topic- I haven't seen this mentioned anywhere else thusfar so here we go. Anyone else feeling that this is kind of Evangelion Anima-like? -Set after a near miss Third Impact (Sure, got further in RoE, but still- not EVERYONE died) - Many, many EVAs (Especially the multiple versions of 02 come to mind) -Asuka is no longer explicitly human due to incident while in an EVA -New Rei in black plug suit Etc, etc. Thoughts? Or am I just totally off?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 18, 2012 3:30 pm Woven into the [SPOILERS AS FUCK] thread , there are many comments to the effect that Yamashita managed to slip his leash in this one -- though he didn't manage to sneak in werewolf Asuka, which is a disappointment.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Nov 18, 2012 3:38 pm Mr. Tines wrote: werewolf Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 18, 2012 3:42 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: What?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jan 01, 2013 7:30 am UPDATE: It looks like Yamashita himself made a tweet about the N2 Reactor, could anyone try to make a synthesis of this article ? OLD POST: Just to mention another thing which reminded me of Anima, in the middle of the technobabble during the activation of the Wunder I heard, twice, the word "N2 Reactor", to my knowledge this thing was mentioned for the first time in Anima.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Tue Jan 01, 2013 12:50 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: UPDATE: It looks like Yamashita himself made a tweet about the N2 Reactor, could anyone try to make a synthesis of this article ? OLD POST: Just to mention another thing which reminded me of Anima, in the middle of the technobabble during the activation of the Wunder I heard, twice, the word "N2 Reactor", to my knowledge this thing was mentioned for the first time in Anima.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jan 01, 2013 12:58 pm For what its worth, N2-Reactors were also mentioned in EVA 2 (The game the CI is from) where there's a hilarious upgraded Jet-Alone that has an N2-Reactor instead of an old-fashioned nuclear one, obviously to prevent the embarassing incident with the last one.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jan 02, 2013 6:09 am I think that Yamashita actually mentioned something about it in his tweet.

But on topic- I haven't seen this mentioned anywhere else thusfar so here we go. Anyone else feeling that this is kind of Evangelion Anima-like? -Set after a near miss Third Impact &#40
